Fav: Explore and save your favorite places
fav_empty_sub: Explore and save your favorite places
required_fields_msg: Please complete name, email and message.
review_first: Be the first to leave a review
verification_hint: We sent a code to your registered email or phone.
empty_category: No places available in this category yet.
edit_profile_email_note: Email cannot be changed as it is used to sign in.
favorites_login_sub: Sign in to save your favorite places and businesses.
favorites_save_place_sub: Sign in to save your favorite places in GuadalupeGO.
review_login_body: You need a GuadalupeGO account to write a review.
review_login_prompt_sub: Sign in to share your experience
profile_login_sub: Sign in to save your favorite places
photo_remove_confirm_body: Do you want to remove your profile photo?
profile_register_sub: Sign up to save favorites and receive news.
delete_account_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action will permanently delete all your information, photo and data.
delete_account_goodbye_title: We're sorry to see you go
delete_account_goodbye_body: Your account has been deleted. We hope to see you again soon.
privacy_intro_body: GuadalupeGO is a local tourism guide app for Guadalupe, NL. We are committed to protecting your personal data.
privacy_data_1: Name and email for your user account
privacy_storage_body: Your data is stored securely both on your device and on our servers. All information is protected and never shared with third parties without your consent.
privacy_location_body: GPS is used only to center the map and show nearby places. It is never stored or shared with third parties.
privacy_rights_body: You can delete your account and all your data at any time from the app settings.
contact_schedule_hours: Monday to Friday 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM
biz_photos_hint: Add up to 4 photos to showcase your business
biz_photos_max_body: You have reached the photo limit.
biz_permission_body: We need access to your gallery to add photos.
biz_success_body: Your business was submitted and is pending approval. We will notify you when it is reviewed.
biz_pending_note: Your business will be pending approval before appearing in the app.
notif_empty_sub: Business updates, events and more will appear here.
mis_negocios_empty: You haven't registered any business yet.
directory_empty_hint: Try a different category or search for another place.
explore_empty_hint: Try a different category or search for another spot.
location_permission_msg: Enable location to see nearby places.
news_no_link_msg: This article doesn't have an original source available.
news_invalid_link_msg: The link for this article is not valid.
login_email_subtitle: We'll send a verification code to your email
register_account_created_msg: We will now send you a verification code
google_signin_coming_soon:
Coming soon.
Requires Google Cloud Console setup.
apple_signin_coming_soon:
Coming soon.
Requires an Apple Developer account.
onboarding_welcome_desc: In a few seconds we'll show you everything the app can do. It'll be quick!
onboarding_tooltip_home_desc: Search any place, business, or event from here. Below you'll find categories, the interactive map, and the FIFA World Cup 2026 section with BBVA Stadium matches.
onboarding_tooltip_idiomas_desc: Tap the 🌐 chip to switch languages instantly. Available in 14 languages!
onboarding_tooltip_directorio_desc: Tap a chip to filter by category. Swipe the results sideways or scroll down to see all.
onboarding_tooltip_explorar_desc: Pick a category and swipe to preview nearby places. Scroll down to see all results.
onboarding_tooltip_eventos_desc: Tap a chip to filter events instantly. Swipe to preview or scroll down for the full list.
onboarding_tooltip_noticias_desc: Read the latest local news and municipal updates. Always current.
onboarding_tooltip_favoritos_desc: Save any place with the heart ❤️ and find it here anytime.
onboarding_tooltip_contacto_desc: 24/7 emergency numbers, municipal directory, and a support form with inappropriate-language detection.
onboarding_tooltip_mapaCompleto_desc: Explore Guadalupe on the full map, center your location, and open it in Google Maps.
onboarding_tooltip_barraLateral_desc: Tap the ☰ button to open the side panel with quick navigation and more options.
onboarding_tooltip_notificaciones_desc: Get municipal alerts, upcoming events, and GuadalupeGO updates here.
onboarding_tooltip_perfil_desc: Sign in to save favorites, manage your businesses, and customize the app.
onboarding_tooltip_editarPerfil_desc: Change your name and profile photo. Tap any field and the label slides up so you can type comfortably.
onboarding_tooltip_registrarNegocio_desc: Have a business in Guadalupe? Register it with photos and a description to appear in the official directory.
onboarding_tooltip_configuracion_desc: Change language, theme, font size, manage privacy, view legal notices, and replay this tour whenever you like.
onboarding_tooltip_privacidad_desc: Review how we use your data, system permissions, and consult the privacy notice and terms & conditions of GuadalupeGO.
onboarding_finish_desc: You now know everything GuadalupeGO has to offer. Time to explore your city!
fav_login_msg: You need to sign in to save places to your favorites.
profanity_inline_warning: Your message contains inappropriate language. Please modify it.
profanity_alert_msg: Your message contains forbidden words. Edit the content before sending.
mundial_opener_match: Jun 11 · Mexico vs South Africa · Estadio Azteca
mundial_news_title: Estadio Monterrey hosted the first qualifying match for the 2026 World Cup!
mundial_news_desc: Bolivia vs Suriname faced off in the Intercontinental Play-Off to define the last ticket to the FIFA World Cup 2026. A World Cup preview at BBVA Stadium.
mundial_disclaimer: Schedule based on the official FIFA draw (Dec 2025). Times in CST (UTC-6). Calendar and results may be updated.
review_profanity_warning: Your review contains forbidden words. Please express yourself respectfully toward this place.
privacy_screen_subtitle: Review how your data is used and the app permissions.
privacy_recommendations_desc: We use your visit and search history to suggest better experiences in Guadalupe.
privacy_location_desc: Only used to show distances and help you discover places near you.
privacy_perm_desc: Enable or disable access like camera or location from your phone's system settings.
notif_welcome_body: Explore places, events, and the directory of Guadalupe, NL. Enjoy the app!
pn_s1_body: The Municipal Government of Guadalupe, with offices at Barbadillo (corner of Hidalgo), 67100, Guadalupe, Nuevo León, and Av. Morones Prieto, Las Huertas, is responsible for processing your personal data.
pn_s2_body: In accordance with the Personal Data Protection Law for Public Entities of the State of Nuevo León (published December 11, 2019), the Municipality is committed to processing your data under the principles of legality, consent, information, quality, purpose, loyalty, proportionality, and accountability.
pn_s3_body: Only personal data strictly necessary to fulfill the purposes set out in this notice are collected. No excess data is gathered, nor is data used for purposes other than those informed here without your prior consent.
pn_s4_body:
Your personal data is used to:

• Provide municipal tourist and cultural information services.
• Personalize the experience within the GuadalupeGO app.
• Show places, events, and news relevant to your location.
• Improve the municipality's digital services.
• Handle citizen requests, complaints, and suggestions.
pn_s5_body:
You have the right to Access, Rectify, Cancel, or Object (ARCO rights) to the processing of your personal data. To exercise them, you may submit your request at:

• Address: Hidalgo 107-A, Guadalupe, Nuevo León.
• Email: unidaddetransparencia@guadalupe.gob.mx

Your request will be processed within the time frames established by law.
pn_s6_body:
The Municipality may transfer your personal data, without requiring your consent, in the following cases:

• Within the Municipal Government of Guadalupe itself.
• To state and federal government bodies.
• To international entities under current cooperation agreements.

In all cases, the confidentiality and security of your information is guaranteed.
pn_s7_body: If you believe your right to personal data protection has been violated, you may turn to the Institute of Transparency, Access to Information and Personal Data Protection of the State of Nuevo León (INFONL) or through the National Transparency Platform.
pn_s8_body: The Municipal Government of Guadalupe reserves the right to modify this notice at any time to adapt it to legislative, judicial, or internal policy changes. Any modifications will be available on the official portal www.guadalupe.gob.mx.
tc_s1_body: By downloading, installing, or using the GuadalupeGO app, you accept these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any of them, please do not use the application.
tc_s2_body:
GuadalupeGO is the official mobile app of the Municipal Government of Guadalupe, Nuevo León, designed to:

• Discover places of tourist, gastronomic, and cultural interest.
• View local events and news.
• Access updated information about the municipality.
• View the interactive map of Guadalupe, N.L.

The municipality reserves the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any feature at any time.
tc_s3_body:
The user agrees to use GuadalupeGO exclusively for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms. The following is prohibited:

• Reproducing, distributing, or modifying app content without authorization.
• Reverse engineering or attempting to extract the source code.
• Using the app to spread false or misleading information.
• Attempting to compromise the security or integrity of the system.
• Automating access through unauthorized bots or scripts.
tc_s4_body:
All GuadalupeGO content —including text, images, logos, icons, maps, data, and source code— is the property of the Municipal Government of Guadalupe or its respective owners and is protected by Mexican and international intellectual property laws.

A personal, non-exclusive, and non-transferable license is granted to access the app for informational purposes only.
tc_s5_body:
The processing of your personal data is governed by the Privacy Notice of the Municipal Government of Guadalupe, available in the "Privacy notice" section of this app and at www.guadalupe.gob.mx.

The app may request access to your location and other device sensors solely to improve your experience. You can revoke these permissions at any time from your device settings.
tc_s6_body:
The Municipal Government of Guadalupe does not guarantee that the information published in GuadalupeGO is always accurate, complete, or up to date. Content is informational and does not constitute legal, medical, financial, or any other kind of advice.

The municipality will not be liable for direct, indirect, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the application.
tc_s7_body:
GuadalupeGO is offered "as is" and "as available". The municipality does not guarantee uninterrupted operation and may perform scheduled or unscheduled maintenance that temporarily affects availability.

It is recommended to keep the app updated to access the latest improvements and security fixes.
tc_s8_body: The Municipal Government of Guadalupe may update these Terms and Conditions at any time. Users will be notified through the application itself or through the official portal. Continued use of GuadalupeGO after such changes implies acceptance of the new terms.
tc_s9_body: These Terms and Conditions are governed by the laws in force in the United Mexican States and the State of Nuevo León. Any dispute arising from their interpretation or application shall be resolved before the competent courts of Guadalupe, Nuevo León, with the parties waiving any other jurisdiction that might apply to them.
tc_s10_body:
For any questions or clarifications about these Terms and Conditions, you may contact the Municipal Government of Guadalupe through:

• Official portal: www.guadalupe.gob.mx
• Email: unidaddetransparencia@guadalupe.gob.mx
• Address: Barbadillo (corner of Hidalgo), 67100, Guadalupe, N.L.
